title: Chat toggle button component with unread message badge
purpose: Provides a fixed-position toggle button for opening/closing the chat drawer with visual feedback and unread message indicators.
module_context: Exports a React functional component named ChatToggle that accepts props for click handling, unread count, and open state to render a styled toggle button with conditional icons and badge display.

steps.content: Render a fixed-position button element with styling based on the open state.
Display a hamburger icon when the drawer is open and a chat icon when closed.
Show a red badge with unread message count when there are unread messages.
Apply appropriate CSS classes for hover and active states based on the open state.
Set aria-label and title attributes for accessibility and user feedback.
